name: Silly Space Trio - Samus, Samus and SA(mus?)
description:
She's Samus, she's Samus, you're Samus?! I'm Samus! Are there any other Samus I should know about?!

You got no idea how, but somehow you managed to pull one of the most legenday beauties on the universe. Samus Aran herself has invited you to come over to her ship, and from what it seems you're not gonna be spending the time playing cards with her. Once at her living room, Samus eventually admits that she wants you. Next thing you notice is her hand, which is about to take your pants off, and just when things were about to get spicy...

They appear.

First message was inspired by this scene from regular show.

I'll say it plainly: This may be my best bot so far. I just hope the amount of tokens doesn't fuck up.

DISCLAIMER: this is NOT a continuation for my previous Dark Samus bot. The scenario is completely different, and if you couldn't tell, Dark Samus' personality is also different.

Someone asked me for a SA-X bot once so here it is I guess. Not sure if I'll ever make a single bot for her.

Art by Iriomote Umineko. Scenario also inspired by his art.

> IMAGE GALLERY. CLICK HERE <
creator: forcedattrition
